summary: Iteration 72: Dual-Mode Shadow Comparison - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.

backend_api_tests: test_shadow_report_returns_both_unit_and_le_sections - PASS: Both unit_size and live_equivalent in report
test_unit_size_section_has_required_fields - PASS: pnl_total, win_rate, binary_win_rate, open_positions, open_exposure, open_total_size, pnl_per_trade, rolling_pnl all present
test_unit_positions_endpoint_works - PASS: Returns positions with size=3, fills=1 (no accumulation)
test_le_positions_endpoint_works - PASS: Returns positions with size up to 24, fills up to 8 (accumulation working)
test_le_positions_have_avg_entry_field - PASS: All LE positions have avg_entry and fills fields
test_le_positions_respect_max_cap - PASS: No position exceeds max_position_size=25
test_unit_closed_endpoint_works - PASS: GET /api/shadow/closed?mode=unit returns valid list
test_le_closed_endpoint_works - PASS: GET /api/shadow/closed?mode=le returns valid list
test_evaluations_have_le_action_field - PASS: le_action field present with accum/cap_blocked entries
test_status_has_no_shadow_data - PASS: /api/status has no shadow contamination
test_pnl_history_has_no_shadow_entries - PASS: /api/analytics/pnl-history has no shadow entries
test_unit_vs_le_total_size_difference - PASS: LE total (135) > Unit total (21) - accumulation visible
frontend_ui_tests: Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
Shadow banner shows 'SHADOW ONLY — NO LIVE EXECUTION' - PASS
Dual-mode cards present: Unit-Size (amber) and Live-Equivalent (cyan) - PASS
Unit-Size card shows: $3.0/signal, one entry per market, no accumulation - PASS
Live-Equivalent card shows: $3.0/signal, accumulates up to 25.0 shares per market - PASS
All 5 tabs present: LE Open, LE Closed, Unit Open, Unit Closed, Evaluations - PASS
LE Open table has Size, Fills, Avg Entry, Notional columns - PASS
LE positions show accumulation (size=24, fills=8) - PASS
Shadow Config shows LE Max Size: 25 - PASS
Evaluations table has LE Action column with cap_blocked entries - PASS
Sniper page shadow summary shows Agreement, Unit PnL, LE PnL - PASS
Sniper shadow summary shows '(6 open, 123 shares)' for LE - PASS
Link to Quant Lab present in shadow summary - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: shadow_sniper.py: Dual-mode implementation is clean with separate _unit_positions and _le_positions dicts
shadow_sniper.py: LE accumulation correctly calculates avg_entry using VWAP: (old_cost + new_cost) / new_size
shadow_sniper.py: Cap enforcement working with le_action='cap_blocked:projected=X>max=Y'
QuantLab.jsx: Dual-mode cards use distinct colors (amber for unit, cyan for LE) with clear labeling
QuantLab.jsx: LE Open table correctly shows Size, Fills, Avg Entry, Notional columns
Sniper.jsx: Shadow summary shows both Unit PnL and LE PnL with open position count
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow system data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 validated the dual-mode shadow comparison system. Key findings: (1) Both Unit-Size and Live-Equivalent modes work independently with separate position tracking, (2) Unit mode always has size=3 and fills=1, (3) LE mode accumulates up to max_position_size=25 with multiple fills and VWAP avg_entry, (4) The UI correctly displays both modes side-by-side with amber (unit) and cyan (LE) styling, (5) LE Open table shows Size/Fills/Avg Entry/Notional columns, (6) Evaluations table shows LE Action column with cap_blocked entries when positions hit the max size, (7) Shadow data remains fully isolated from /api/status and /api/analytics/pnl-history.
